base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of npc_townsperson_idle — a character from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Generic townsperson — dark tunic + hood. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Generic townsperson — dark tunic + hood; walks in town squares. Gives cryptic hints including the infamous 'GRAVEYARD DUCK' mistranslation
